name: embed
description: Embedding generation — local only, no fallback to external.

name: classify
description: Prompt and pattern classification — local models, smallest first.

name: summarize
description: L2 logic flow summaries, docstring generation — local then external fallback.

name: reasoning
description: Complex analysis, root cause, recommendations — local then external fallback.

name: consensus-proposer
description: MOE panel: proposer — strong reasoning model, proposes root cause and action.

name: consensus-challenger
description: MOE panel: challenger — different model family, challenges and refines proposal.

name: consensus-synthesizer
description: MOE panel: synthesizer — combines analyses into consensus. Can use external for higher quality.
